prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document specifically pertains to environmental noise regulation and mapping in England, as managed by Defra (the Department for Environment, Food & Rural Affairs). Scotland has its own distinct environmental regulations and frameworks, and this document does not apply to Scotland.
